architecture.temporal_backend: causal Conv2d over [batch, channels, sensors, time]

dataset_interface_reference.policy: Reference interface only. The future canonical PEMS-BAY runner must assemble dynamic corrupted windows directly to guarantee window-specific causal elapsed-gap recomputation.

model_full_name: Masked Sensor-Shared Causal Temporal Convolutional Network v2
portability_note: Paths rewritten project-root-relative from the frozen original in configs/frozen/.

shared_data_contract.causal_elapsed_policy: Recompute elapsed-gap values causally from the effective window-specific history mask after artificial dropout. For an unavailable pre-series carry index, initialize elapsed state at the configured cap.
shared_data_contract.history_corruption_policy: Artificial failures are applied only to historically native observed cells. The effective history mask is native mask AND NOT artificial-removal mask.
shared_data_contract.native_observation_definition: A native observation is finite and strictly greater than zero.
shared_data_contract.normalization_policy: Use only train-partition normalization statistics. Do not estimate normalization statistics from selection, calibration, or primary-test partitions.
shared_data_contract.target_policy: Forecast targets remain native and uncorrupted. Masked normalized L1 training loss and raw-speed selection MAE must use the native target-observation mask.
shared_data_contract.target_start_definition: For target start t, history is [t-12, t-1] and forecast target is [t, t+11].
